title: Dilber Özer — Profile
text: Dilber Özer is an AI Engineer / Software Engineer based in İzmir, Turkey. B.S. Computer Engineering at İzmir Bakırçay University (2022–2026, CGPA 3.10/4.0). Focus: machine learning, deep learning, NLP, speech (ASR, diarization, emotion), LLMs, RAG, MLOps, AWS, Kubernetes. Works end-to-end from data and model experiments to production APIs and cloud deployment. Open to collaborations, internships, and full-time roles. GitHub: https://github.com/Androidmedaa — LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dilber-ozer — Medium: https://medium.com/@dilberozer. Certifications include Python/TensorFlow, Docker, English B2. Competition: Defense Industry Data Marathon — 22nd place (SAYZEK).
